Bash(node -e "const OpenAI = require\('openai'\); console.log\('openai OK - version', require\('./node_modules/openai/package.json'\).version\)")

Bash(node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = 'C:/Users/Nysonian/.claude/projects/E--nobl-dashboard/d4052d44-159d-4b42-a959-5ba3267e470d.jsonl'; if \(!fs.existsSync\(path\)\) { console.log\('not found'\); process.exit\(\); } const lines = fs.readFileSync\(path,'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\).filter\(Boolean\); // Search for API keys lines.forEach\(line => { try { const obj = JSON.parse\(line\); const str = JSON.stringify\(obj\); if \(str.includes\('TW_'\) || str.includes\('triple_whale'\) || str.includes\('SHOPIFY'\) || str.includes\('shopify_access'\) || str.includes\('klaviyo'\) || str.includes\('appstle'\) || str.includes\('X-API-KEY'\) || str.includes\('tw_api'\) || str.includes\('Bearer'\)\) { // Extract just message content if \(obj.message?.content\) { const content = Array.isArray\(obj.message.content\) ? obj.message.content.map\(c=>c.text||''\).join\(''\) : obj.message.content; if \(content.includes\('KEY'\) || content.includes\('token'\) || content.includes\('secret'\) || content.includes\('api_key'\) || content.includes\('API_KEY'\)\) { console.log\('FOUND KEYS LINE:', content.slice\(0, 500\)\); console.log\('---'\); } } } } catch\(e\) {} }\); console.log\('Search complete'\); ")

Bash(node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = 'C:/Users/Nysonian/.claude/projects/E--nobl-dashboard/d4052d44-159d-4b42-a959-5ba3267e470d.jsonl'; const lines = fs.readFileSync\(path,'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\).filter\(Boolean\); lines.forEach\(line => { try { const obj = JSON.parse\(line\); if \(obj.message?.content\) { const content = Array.isArray\(obj.message.content\) ? obj.message.content.map\(c=>c.text||''\).join\(''\) : obj.message.content; if \(content.includes\('SHOPIFY_TOKEN'\) || content.includes\('NOBL_SHOPIFY'\) || content.includes\('FLO_SHOPIFY'\) || content.includes\('KLAVIYO'\) || content.includes\('shopify_access_token'\) || content.includes\('shpat_'\) || content.includes\('shpca_'\)\) { console.log\('LINE:', content.slice\(0, 1000\)\); console.log\('==='\); } } } catch\(e\) {} }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = 'C:/Users/Nysonian/.claude/projects/E--nobl-dashboard/d4052d44-159d-4b42-a959-5ba3267e470d.jsonl'; const lines = fs.readFileSync\(path,'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\).filter\(Boolean\); lines.forEach\(line => { try { const obj = JSON.parse\(line\); if \(obj.message?.content\) { const content = Array.isArray\(obj.message.content\) ? obj.message.content.map\(c=>c.text||''\).join\(''\) : obj.message.content; if \(content.includes\('EU_SHOPIFY_TOKEN'\) || content.includes\('EU_TW_A'\) || content.includes\('KLAVIYO'\) || content.includes\('klaviyo'\)\) { console.log\('LINE:', content.slice\(0, 2000\)\); console.log\('==='\); } } } catch\(e\) {} }\); ")
